summary: Velion ON/OFF Control System - Iteration 138. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All core features verified. Toggle in hamburger menu works, mode persists via API, OFF mode disables bubbles/polling but keeps overlay visible and clickable, 'Velion (OFF)' tooltip shows when OFF, hint text appears when OFF.
critical_code_review_comments: velion.py: GET /mode returns {mode, show_autonomy} - mode defaults to 'on' for new users
velion.py: PUT /mode validates mode is 'on' or 'off', defaults to 'on' for invalid values
velion.py: POST /dismiss-autonomy sets last_autonomy_prompt timestamp, show_autonomy becomes false
velion.py: show_autonomy logic checks account age >= 5 days AND no recent dismissal
VelionOverlay.jsx: isOff flag (mode === 'off') controls all useEffect hooks for polling/greeting/page-change
VelionOverlay.jsx: When OFF - gray glow instead of cyan, saturation 0.5, no notification dot, tooltip 'Velion (OFF)'
VelionOverlay.jsx: onClick still works when OFF to open VelionPanel
App.js: VelionMenuControl component shows toggle and 'Apri' button in hamburger menu
App.js: Toggle communicates via window events ('velion-toggle-mode', 'velion-mode-changed') and window.__velionMode global
context_for_next_testing_agent: Velion ON/OFF Control System fully verified. Key findings: 1) GET /api/velion/mode returns {mode: 'on'|'off', show_autonomy: boolean}. 2) PUT /api/velion/mode with {mode: 'off'} saves to velion_prefs collection. 3) POST /api/velion/dismiss-autonomy marks last_autonomy_prompt. 4) Hamburger menu (data-testid='mobile-menu-btn') shows 'Assistente Velion' section with toggle (data-testid='velion-mode-toggle') and 'Apri' button (data-testid='menu-velion-btn'). 5) When OFF: no bubble notifications, gray glow, saturation 0.5, tooltip 'Velion (OFF)', hint text 'Riattiva Velion per suggerimenti automatici'. 6) When OFF: overlay still visible and clickable, panel opens normally. 7) Autonomy prompt (show_autonomy=true) only triggers for accounts >= 5 days old without recent dismissal - test user may not trigger this.

toggle_functionality.behavior: Switches mode ON/OFF, persists via API, updates UI immediately

off_mode_no_bubble.behavior: No bubble notifications appear when mode is OFF

off_mode_overlay_clickable.behavior: Velion overlay visible and clickable when OFF, opens VelionPanel

on_mode_regression.behavior: Bubble notifications appear normally when ON

tutorial_chat_tabs_regression.behavior: Tutorial and Chat tabs work regardless of mode
